text.tspan: RP2350-LCD-1.47-A | v0.2 | 2026-03-17 | Lazy Build (no ADC RC filters)
Both INA219: I2C0 bus GP8(SDA) / GP9(SCL)
- I2C0 @ 100kHz on GP8/GP9 (shared by both INA219, 50ms timeout)
- ADC: 12-bit, 16x oversample, EMA smooth, 8-count deadband at center
- Lazy build: no RC filters on ADC inputs. Upgrade: add 1k + 100nF per pot
- Battery Shield V3 switch only controls USB-A port. External SW1 for power off
